profiles.notes: Smoke-only baseline override. Camera.fps is pinned to 30 for the current harness lane, and Camera.RGB follows the upstream TUM-VI example until the user's export path confirms the real ordering.
Optional comparison profile for the second lens under the same smoke-only overrides.

notes: Harness-integrated config smoke for the shareable Insta360 X3 calibration subset. It writes two monocular YAMLs, validates the required scalar ORB-SLAM3 fields, and records the remaining blockers for any future stereo+IMU settings bundle.
